versions.label: v1.1.2
versions.description: Adds an explicit fastest-success objective and stalled-strategy reassessment guidance to v1.1.1.
versions.comparison_note: Current public baseline. Compare scores directly within this version.

versions.label: v1.1.1
versions.description: Adds a restricted Playwright-shaped MCP surface to the v1.1.0 browser controls.
versions.comparison_note: Historical baseline before explicit fastest-success guidance; compare with v1.1.2 cautiously.

versions.label: v1.1.0
versions.description: Generalized visible action instructions and a 16-hour agent timeout, before MCP support.
versions.comparison_note: Historical baseline before MCP support; compare with v1.1.1 cautiously.

versions.label: v1.0.0
versions.description: 12-hour prestige baseline after isolation and harness improvements.
versions.comparison_note: Historical 12-hour baseline; not directly comparable to v1.1.x.

versions.label: v0
versions.description: Earlier benchmark baseline retained for historical comparison.
versions.comparison_note: Legacy results are retained for audit history only.
